programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 1

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 3

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 5

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 11

programme.desc: After arresting Fidel, the intelligence community learns that classified information still reaches Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In 2004, the FBI and NCIS needed to catch an engineer who had been stealing U.S. Navy secrets for the Chinese government.

programme.desc: The Playmate Killer, Paul Snider, was one of the creators of Chippendales, the male strip club chain. But he is most remembered as the killer of Playboy Model Dorothy Stratten.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A love-struck girlfriend hijacks a helicopter to pluck her man from jail and one of the world's biggest breakouts: 38 inmates in one go!

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S3 Ep. 4

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 6

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: March 1995 – when a skull is found at Botany Beach the police, crime scene examiners and the forensic pathologist, among other specialists, were brought to the scene.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 5

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Samantha Bodsworth's body was found in a Noosa carpark. The killer thought he had committed the perfect murder but a little known area of forensic science would be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 1

programme.title: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine.

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident.

programme.title: On the Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer.

programme.title: God's Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of a police car.

programme.title: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a black teenager

programme.title: Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: Hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver.

programme.title: Messy Houses
programme.desc: When Andy answers a domestic disturbance call, the social worker turns out to be her estranged mother.

programme.title: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe.

programme.title: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: A gifted psychic (or a gifted conman) helps find the missing witness in an organized-crime case.

programme.title: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women.

programme.title: Out of Time

programme.title: The Rules

programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.desc: After months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick - then Andy - go missing.

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex-convict.

programme.title: Different, Not Better

programme.title: The Kids Are Not Alright

programme.title: Poison Pill

programme.title: Skeletons
programme.desc: There's a possible connection between a missing woman and one of the division’s most distressing cases.

programme.title: For Better, for Worse

programme.title: What I Lost

programme.title: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of a shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2

programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some "No Look Slaps," hit the "Sensi-Button," and experience the drama of "The Circle Of Life."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 822
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 715
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, American Idol Winner, Jordin Sparks, joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Wet And Afraid," watch some dogs go "Nuts About Balls" and learn it's hard to breathe with "No Air."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling discuss a condition called "Temporary Fansanity", people who are "Quick To Cry" and our favorite summer sporting event, the "Bro Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 728
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling check out some hard-working monkeys in "Bananas Ain't Free," throw down in "Stripe Club" and dress up nice for some "Formal Slams."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Action Bronson joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to showcase his wrestling moves with "Bronsonmania," watch some "White People Dancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 723
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from "Space Invaders," nap hard after a "Slumber Punch," and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on "Too Much Nip."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, and with a whole new stage, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Do It For The Vine", bust out their 3D glasses for the category "3Diculousness" and watch some old folks slam in the "Grey Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, business guru Marcus Lemonis shows us his "Lemonis Face", teaches us the 3Ps of "People, Process, Pain" and finally discovers that "They Do Exist!".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate summer vacation by getting SAND BLASTED, take a trip to PAINLAND and party with THE BANG GANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop producer and hit maker DJ Mustard joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put MUSTARD ON EVERYTHING, suffer through a COLD SUMMER, and celebrate the greatest HEY MAKERS of all time.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 820
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get a little ZAP HAPPY, live the JUGG LIFE, and get energized by some BEATSPIRATION.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 821
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob, Stee-Lo and Chanel to talk about the " Legends Of Campfoo", going "Lights Out" and learn what it means to get "Party Rock'd".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Young M.A joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about people who have HOT SAUCE, the meaning of RED LYFE, and the joy of CASH BATHS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motivational speaker Michael Crossland joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to teach us the CROSSLAND METHOD, show us what it means when your dog is CROSS-BRED, and visit the FIELD OF NIGHTMARES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 716
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel try out some "Competitive Sleeping," experience the confusion of "Creature Shock" and go too hard on a "Sunday Doneday."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop star Vic Mensa joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some close calls in STILL ALIVE, learn creative ways to SAVE MORE MONEY and get extra strange with A LOT GOING ON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, singer-songwriter Jessie J joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to learn how to DO IT LIKE A DUDE, hear some harsh truths in MOM-SPLAINING and watch the bodies slam in BANG BANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Music producer Clinton Sparks teaches Rob, Chanel, and Steelo how to make budget beats with SPARKS OF GENIUS, get cultured with some MASSHOLES, and cause some serious mom damage with MAMA TRAUMA.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 4

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 815
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to sweeten the sound of people's slams in "T-Pain Your Pain", talk about "Hard 180s"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 828
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 729
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by pop singer Zara Larsson to go "Beast Catching," shed some "Beyonce Tears," and sing along to the "Worstest Love Of All."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some BRO BURIALS, hang with a crew of LIL' TRUNKIES and teach us a new trend called SPEED BUMPING.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 20

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 21

programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggie's love life.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 11

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 12

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker deals with chaos at work while Reggie studies for a test and Margaret attends the reading of a will. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 14

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker is arrested for being confrontational and forced to do community service and Bob moves in with Linda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker feels old after having to renew his driver's license.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Becker fights over a phone bill, Reggie is angry over not being invited to a wedding and Bob gains too much confidence listening to self-help tapes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Becker mistakenly tells the wrong family that their father has died, while Margaret and Linda deal with Linda's depressed friend Lynda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a seeing-eye-dog. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 21

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 22

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 23

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: John is in an awkward situation when his building super is found dead of natural causes

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 3

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker is a mentor to a student and Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 6

programme.desc: The designers are asked to work in pairs to make two looks for country music star Miranda Lambert.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers must work in teams of two to create looks for “mature” women.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In teams of two, the designers are tasked with making a prom dress out of duct tape.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Regrouping once again, the judges decide which designers they would like to see work together.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers make a ready-to-wear look for Lord and Taylor, inspired by their famous rose design.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In pairs again, the designers crate two looks: one avant-garde and a second ready-to-wear piece.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are relieved when they receive the news that they will now be working on their own.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The remaining designers are paired with new assistants and each sent to a European fashion capital.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The few designers left return to their hometowns to begin working on their final collections.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers present their final collections at Mercedes Benz Fashion Week and a winner is named.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Taken to the exclusive Sydney Vaucluse Yacht club, the contestants are divided into two teams and told they have $500 to plan, make, and serve a banquet for ten people.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The losing team from the Off Site challenge must select which member must leave. With just an hour to talk through their decision it looks like the team leader might become the fall guy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Friday night is Master Class night, and George and Gary are cooking up a storm. They revisit the week's challenges, and offer their take on how the contestants might have faired better. The tips fly fast and furious as the experts reveal their secrets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Tonight, the competitors face two back to back challenges. First, the mystery box, in which all have just half an hour to create a spectacular dish from unknown ingredients. Then, the winner decides upon a Chinese style for the invention challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The three weakest performers from last night cook off to stay in the competition. Each must cook the same dish - stuffed squid. None have cooked such an intricate dish before, and are soon buckling under the pressure.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Tonight, the winner of Sunday night's Invention Challenge gets a chance to advance through to the final week of the competition with tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge. But standing in the way is chef, television presenter and restaurateur, Peter Evans.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Tonight the competitors are divided into red & blue teams, led by Gary and George. They head to the supermarket to choose ingredients for a 3-course meal, but the catch is: each team is only allowed to shop from 3 randomly assigned supermarket aisles

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: It's the toughest night of the week for the competitors. While the winning team from last night's challenge enjoy an Asian cooking course, the losers must now decide which of their number will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The competitors get their weekly chance to watch some of the best chefs in the country prepare dishes. Tonight, Frank Shek from leading restaurant China Doll gives a lesson in Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Tonight's Mystery Box tests the contender's seafood skills. They've got just half an hour to create their dish using a whole snapper, chilli, eggs & beer. Chris decides his best bet is to drink the beer, while Tom tests his skills with an Asian dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Each of the bottom three from last night's challenge must cook sticky date pudding with butterscotch sauce. It's a restaurant favourite, but given its simplicity, the judges will notice even the tiniest flaw. Who will be judged the weakest?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: In tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge, the contestant must produce a better gnocchi than Alex Herbert, from the famed Bird Cow Fish restaurant in Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 27
programme.desc: The group divides into red and blue teams, for a challenge at Sydney's Royal Easter Show. Each has $750 to buy ingredients at the Fresh Food Dome, and must cook up dishes to entice the passing crowd to buy their food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Team elimination is the toughest night of the week for competitors in the losing team. They must decide which of their team mates deserves to be sent home. Friendships are tested and emotions stretched, never more so than tonight.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 29
programme.desc: The contestants get their weekly fix of cooking class from Gary and George. On the menu this time, how to cook snapper using a paper bag, and the perfect steak.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 30
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box contestants must create their own designer cupcakes, and the designs are indeed unique as Chris decides beer is the magic secret ingredient that will get him over the line.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 31
programme.desc: The contestants are given the recipe, and all the ingredients they need to cook a paella. For cooks of this calibre, it shouldn't be a problem. But add a 45 minute time limit, and the stress of knowing they are cooking for their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 32
programme.desc: The winner of Sunday night's invention challenge gets the opportunity to cook against legendary Australian chef Guy Grossi.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 33
programme.desc: They say it's important for a chef to understand their produce, & today the contestants get to know fish. Divided into two teams & on a strict time limit, they're sent out into the rough seas beyond Sydney Heads, where they'll catch the fish to cook with.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 34
programme.desc: It's the worst night of the week for the contestants, with the losing team having to vote a person out of MasterChef Australia for good. Will the team captain go down with the losing ship?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 35
programme.desc: It's the cook's night off, as Chefs Gary and George take over the kitchen to reveal their cooking tips. This week, Lobster Bisque and Cupcakes are on the menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Just when the contestants were getting the hang of the MasterChef Kitchen, they're thrown a curve ball. Instead of a mystery box, they're faced with a taste test. Whoever picks the most ingredients in a dish, wins an advantage in the Invention Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 37
programme.desc: In the toughest Pressure Test yet, four competitors each cook a croquembouche to avoid elimination. A decorative cone of profiteroles and toffee, this dish exceeds all expectations.They virtually need an architectural degree to create this masterpiece.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Tonight, the winning contestant from Sunday night cooks against one of Australias top chefs. Can this week's contestant go up against Ben O'Donoghue and win?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Once again the contestants are divided into red and blue teams for an offsite challenge. Tonight, they need to prepare canapÃ©s for the launch of the Martini Club at the luxurious Observatory Hotel in the heart of Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Who was the weakest link in the Martini Club challenge? One person must leave MasterChef Australia for good, and it's up to the losing team to cast their votes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 41
programme.desc: Gary and George take over the Kitchen for another night of cooking lessons. Fetta Blini with Smoked Beetroot and Roasted John Dory as well as a mouth-watering homemade vanilla ice cream.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 42
programme.desc: First up tonight, the tropical themed mystery box, which contains kingfish, pineapple, rum, coconut and sweet potato. The winning contestant gets the right to choose the key ingredients in the night's big test, the invention challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 43
programme.desc: The bottom three from last night's Invention Challenge now face the Pressure Test. They must each create a salmon terrine. While they're competing against each other, these three are also among the closest friends in the house.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: One tribe is plagued by multiple injuries, while the other, faced with conflicting ideas about camp priorities, struggles to keep the camp together.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: A sudden turn of events spurs new activity at the camps.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The tribe that wins this week's reward challenge gets to raid the other tribe's camp.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Certain members of the old Maraamu tribe set their sights on reorganizing the loyalties of the original Rotu tribe.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tensions rise among the castaways after the tribes merge into one.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kathy continues to question the loyalties of the original Rotu tribe members.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Watch highlights of the first 24 days on the island of Nuku Hiva.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Eight are left. Who will be voted out tonight?

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After 28 days, the tribe can no longer bear to eat the slimy sea creatures.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A shocking event sends the castaways on an emotional rollercoaster.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Kathy is faced with a difficult decision. Meantime, Paschal is less than pleased after making certain judgments about two tribe members.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The remaining two survivors argue their case for winning.

programme.title: Survivor US S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The live votes are tallied and the winner is crowned. Reunion show from New York’s Central Park, hosted by Rosie O’Donnell.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Australian Survivor: Titans V Rebels. With 24 brand new players back on the beaches of Samoa, who will outwit, outplay, and outlast the others to take home the half million-dollar prize?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A clever strategic partnership, 'The Invisible Hand' tries to control the game. But can these two tribe mates stay out of the firing line?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Rebels are in high spirits and the cuddle club have big plans to strengthen their tribe... But can they pull it off?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Titans wake up in high spirits, but nothing is quite as it seems when a new discovery raises suspicions.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The aftermath of Tribal Council hits home as a strong alliance is left untethered. Can an uncovered mystery give rise to a new power? Or will it cause more friction than ever before?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Both tribes deal with the aftermath of Tribal Council and a hurricane of a different sort comes to Survivor beach. Strategies are questioned. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: With a pivotal vote out of the way, each tribe begins to turn on one another and a major milestone of the game gets in the way of their plans.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: After an epic blindside one tribe is divided, and another is out for revenge. And after a chaotic scramble, where no one believes anyone, anything can happen at Tribal Council.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lucy and Mario host their engagement party, but who will be invited? Joey and Sam go on a double date with Essex’s newest couple, Arg and Gemma. Little Chris makes Mario an engagement present, but will he be his best man?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Sammi returns to the house & Ronnie is speechless. Snooki's feelings for Vinny continue to grow. Mike hooks up with a girl who he says smells like cheese, but is it just a prank? Series 3, Episode 10.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Mike keeps instigating drama between Ron and Sammi, Snooki falls out with Vinny. Deena gets upset at Pauly and Vin for trying to hook up with her friend at the end-of-summer party.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: While one couple reaches a crossroads in their relationship, another couple makes it official. The roommates say goodbye to another summer at the Jersey Shore. Series 3, Episode 13.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 314
programme.desc: Snooki and Vinny define their relationship; JWOWW tells us how she really feels about Roger; Deena clears up some rumours and Sammi and Ronnie talk about why they just couldn't make it work.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 400
programme.desc: An entertaining look back at the first three seasons of Jersey Shore - complete with all the comedy, drama, mischievous antics, and water cooler moments that keep people talking.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: The housemates pack up their hair extensions & Shore Store t-shirts & jet off for an Italian adventure. But the culture-shock that awaits is nothing compared to their shocking new hook-ups. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: Deena & Pauly consider the consequences should they hook up. The Situation tries to take his friendship with Snooki to the next level. Ron & Sammi try to be friends but old habits die hard. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With twins in the mix, it's double trouble as bi-curious Deena pulls the robbery on both The Situation and Vinny. Plus, The Situation's 'secret hook-up' with Snooki is revealed. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed. Ronnie & Sammi are back to their old ways, but this time The Situation is involved in their drama. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: After causing drama between Ronnie & Sammi for years, The Situation comes to blows with Ronnie. But with The Situation carried out on a stretcher, have things finally gone too far? (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: S4, Ep 7. When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki & Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. Whilst back in Florence, Team Meatball has a run-in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatball from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's boyfriend Jionni comes to visit, a romantic evening ends with Snooki sobbing alone on the street.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: Deena panics after missing her period. After an all-night fight with Jionni, Snookie decides to take a break from the relationship. Mike tries to win her over, but someone else ends up comforting her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: After Mike's prank backfires, the guys visit Vinny's family in Sicily and the girls class it up on a Tuscan wine tour. Snooki learns the truth about her hook-up with Vin and must come clean to Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Charlotte tries to take her relationship with Josh to the next level by meeting his friends, but her world is sent into a spin when she finds out that her ex Stephen is back in the UK. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Charlotte decides it's time to introduce Josh to her parents, but when Josh takes back a heartfelt message it leaves her questioning the relationship. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Charlotte's week turns bad when her ex starts posting messages about her on social media, and it gets worse when a blazing row with Josh looks to have ended their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Things are looking rocky between Charlotte and Josh. Will Josh finally ask Charlotte to be his girlfriend, or will he leave her with no choice but to end their relationship for good? (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Charlotte attends the premiere for The Charlotte Show and hosts a party to celebrate. But when Josh sees a clip of her with another boy in Australia it brings back bad memories. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Charlotte gets together with her mum, dad and Melissa to watch unseen footage from the series, including hilarious out-takes, funny moments and revealing chats. Plus Charlotte has a surprise for Mel.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte and Josh are in a great place, but they have a huge row on the day of his sister's baby shower. Charlotte arranges a night out. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte and Mel come face to face to try and resolve their differences. Josh invites Charlotte to Bolton for a big family dinner and Charlotte surprises her Mam by taking her on a trip. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Charlotte and her Mam head off to Iceland on a mission to save the whales. Josh decides to go on a big night out which leads to a huge row. Charlotte is left questioning their relationship. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: With their new schedule and a plan for their parents to meet, Josh and Charlotte are better than ever. But things take a turn for the worse when Charlotte attempts to surprise Josh. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Michael Sneyd, CEO of mega resort business Skyline International Development, goes undercover to get creative with the employees at the foot of the chain and take their ideas to new heights.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lisa Lisson, the first female president of FedEx Express Canada, goes undercover to find out if her employees have the right resources to provide exceptional service in the fiercely competitive courier industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Boss Terry Davis has been with Home Hardware Stores for 42 years. He worked his way up to the top – now he’s returning to the shop floors and factories to turn flaws into fixes.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Canlan Ice Sports Corp is the largest private owner of sports facilities in North America. CEO Joey St Aubin admits their prices are higher than local municipal rinks, but believes his company offers a premium service and better ice quality.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Purdy’s dominates the West Coast, but is struggling to make an impression elsewhere. To boost sales, the Chocolate Queen travels the country, working in disguise in her own stores and factory floors.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This episode nets an exclusive “behind the scenes” look at what it really takes to get fish on our dinner plates.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The Victorian Order of Nurses takes the pressure off hospitals by providing care for people in their own homes. Hundreds of rival companies compete for cash and customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tervita specializes in environmental clean-up for Western Canada’s booming energy and mining industries. It doesn’t take long for Fory Musser,

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kristen Flynn, the boss of Premiere Van Lines. She’s a woman with a formidable reputation. Her own staff call her “Frugal Flynn” because she watches the pennies to protect profit.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: PJ’s Pets is one of the nation’s oldest pet store chains, but the company has a new President in place, and she’s determined to rattle a few cages. Margaret Kordas steps out of her stilettos when she spends a week working in her own stores.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: For nearly 20 years, T&T Supermarket dominated sales, but now competition is “cut throat”. That's good enough reason for Tina Lee, the boss of T&T Supermarket, to swap her upscale lifestyle for a week working undercover in her own stores.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The CEO of Canadian restaurant chain East Side Mario’s finds out what it’s really like for the Average Joe when he steps away from financial management to spend a week working undercover in his own kitchens

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: While undercover as an entry-level employee, the President and COO of Waste Management, Larry O'Donnell is fired for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Working undercover in his own company, Coby Brooks, President and CEO of Hooters is shocked to learn that his company may have a negative public perception.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Former Army man, Joe DePinto, now President and CEO of 7Eleven, goes undercover to work on his company's front lines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dave Rife, White Castle owner and grandson of the founder, goes undercover in the family business.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: COO of Churchill Downs, Bill Carstanjan, faces his fear of horses head-on to go undercover in his own company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Michael Rubin, one of America's youngest CEOs, goes undercover in the billion-dollar e-commerce company that he founded.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Joel Manby, a boss who recently turned his life around, goes undercover in his nationwide theme park and amusement company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: President and COO Rick Arquilla goes undercover in the largest plumbing and drain cleaning company in North America.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chris McCann, President and COO of America's largest florist and online gift shops, goes undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve Joyce hits the frontlines of his own company, which includes such popular hotel franchises as Comfort Inn, Econo Lodge, Quality and Cambria Suites, and receives an exhausting, up-close look at the industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kim Schaefer, CEO of Great Wolf Resorts, North America's largest family of indoor waterpark resorts, struggles to keep pace working in an aquatic center and gets her hands dirty when she responds to a call no waterpark employee wants to receive.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mike White, Chairman, President and CEO of DIRECTV, the world's most popular video service goes undercover in his own company where he discovers that employees are spending their own money for a specific piece of equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bryan Bedford, Chairman of the Board, President and CEO of Frontier Airlines, goes undercover in his own company, where he "gets christened" while emptying a plane's lavatory and discovers how company-wide pay cuts are impacting his employees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Phelps, SVP and Chief Marketing Officer for NASCAR, the #1 spectator sport in the U.S., goes undercover with one of the sport's pit crews and also struggles to keep pace working alongside a grounds crew preparing for the "Daytona 500."

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fernando Aguirre, Chairman and CEO of Chiquita, one of the largest producers of fruits and vegetables in the world, is unable to perform a physically demanding job at their flagship factory and has to be removed from the line.

programme.desc: In this episode, police and paramedics deal with people who have reacted badly to legal highs.
