programme.title: Vicious Vixens
programme.desc: When a woman turns to violence no matter the consequence she is a formidable force. Cross her at your own risk

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 87
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: In the 1980s, the United States faced a deadly new enemy abroad, an expanding network of terrorists targeting American interests. Hundreds of innocent people were killed in bombings, executions, and hijackings.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 48
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 67
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 66
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: In the 1990s, neighborhoods in Detroit were terrorized by a gang of robbers. Impersonating police officers, they invaded over 100 homes robbing, raping and torturing their victims.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 119
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 80
programme.desc: In 1992, a woman disappeared from her Memphis home. When the ransom went uncollected, the FBI suspected a desperate amateur and feared the worst.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 66
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 31
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental brain fingerprinting technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 81
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 63
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 51
programme.desc: A report on the 2007 murder of Jennifer Turner, married but separated from Dr. Kirk Turner, due to his infidelities with the family banker, Tondja Colvin. Jennifer had filed for divorce and also brought an alienation of affection suit against Tondja.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On December 2, 2000, 30-year-old Eric Miller died in a Raleigh, North Carolina hospital. Blood tests had revealed that he had been poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Susan Wright was a stay-at-home mother from Texas who stabbed her husband Jeff, 193 times. She claimed she was a victim of domestic abuse and that on January 13, 2003, her husband attacked her with a knife and she fought back in self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 42
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 28
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious 2009 death of world champion boxer Arturo Gatti. When Gatti was found dead in Brazil, police characterized the death as a homicide and arrested his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A report on the November 14, 2006 shooting of Danny Hill, by his wife, Charlene. Charlene claimed that their seemingly happy life together was a facade and that she shot him in self-defense

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 56
programme.desc: A report about Don North, a free spirit who took to the waters of the Caribbean, living among the tight-knit "cruiser community", a group of individuals who choose to live their lives on the water.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 7
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 52
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The story of Amanda Knox, an American exchange student who was convicted, along with her Italian boyfriend, Raffaelle Sollecito, of murdering Amanda’s British roommate, Meredith Kercher in 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 61
programme.desc: An investigation into the 1999 scuba diving death of Shelley Tyre while on vacation on the Caribbean isle of Tortola. Police questioned her husband and dive partner David Swain about every detail of the dive; autopsy results were inconclusive.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In September 2002, two men were found executed in a burning Mercedes in an upscale Hollywood neighborhood. What initially looked like a drug-related murder, turned out to be something entirely different, but the crime scene left little evidence to go on.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 38
programme.desc: A report on questions surrounding the apparent suicide of Jocelyn Earnest, a successful businesswoman who was found dead in her home in December 2007, from a gunshot wound to her head, with a revolver by her side and a suicide note on the floor.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 48
programme.desc: A report about a desolate strip of land between Houston and Galveston where over 30 young women and girls have disappeared or have been murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 39
programme.desc: A report about three Texas housewives, Tammye Markle, Joni Shannon, and Tina Wiley, who call themselves the "Facebook Detectives" and who used the Internet to try to find their friend Lisa Stone, who disappeared from her Dallas home in June 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In October of 2009, 20-year-old Noor Almaleki and Amal Khalaf, the mother of her boyfriend Marwan, walked out of a Peoria, Arizona DES office and were struck by an SUV driven by Noor's father and Iraqi immigrant, Faleh Hassan Almaleki.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report on the murders of Philip Heidt and his son Carey, the shooting of Philip's wife, Linda, and the secret extra-marital affair of Carey's wife Robin with his brother Craig, who has been convicted of the murders of his father and his brother.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report about Harold Landry, a self-made millionaire who left behind his life in Louisiana to pursue a romance with a British woman he met online, and how this seemingly perfect relationship ended when Lucy Landry was murdered at their home in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 49
programme.desc: A report on Canadian filmmaker Mark Twitchell, whose obsession with the Showtime television series "Dexter" turned to reality and led to murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 27
programme.desc: A report on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent eighteen years -- twelve of them on death row -- in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 36

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Cape Cod to investigate the Orleans Inn. Some of the claims here are that candles light on their own, glasses slide off tables, and hauntings by two separate men who hung themselves.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Coventry, Connecticut to investigate the Nathan Hale Homestead. Nathan Hale was an American Patriot who fought in the Revolutionary War and was executed by the Britishfor being a spy.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS returns to Mansfield, Ohio to investigate the Bissman Building, where the current manager, Ellis Byrd, was nearly choked to death by a black mist.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On this special Halloween episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio to investigate the Cincinnati Music Hall, a buildingwhere the hauntingsare as frequent as the performances.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 23
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gloucester, Massachusetts to investigate Hammond Castle.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: TAPS has received an urgent call for help from a Chicago community center whose patrons are being chased away by a variety of menacing spirits.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Scott Township, Pennsylvania to investigate the Pennsylvania Asylum and Testing Lab.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Amy is back! TAPS travels to Shreveport, Louisiana to investigate the historic Shreveport Auditorium, a place famous for introducing Elvis and other rock n' rolls stars to the world.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 25
programme.desc: TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,the TAPS team has been asked to go to Paddy Reilly's Bar in Manhattan, New York to help explain some after hours activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: TAPSis called out to Joplin, Missouri to help 3 generations of afamilyliving on one haunted estate! Could both houses on the property harbor entities that couldbring harm to their children?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.desc: It's touch and go for a python that has been attacked by two dogs; Johnny's artistic side is ignited, and Julia tries to control some misbehaving kids.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Riley has a fear of stingrays. Like many people the death of Croc Hunter Steve Irwin led him to believe that stingrays are dangerous animals. But are they? To find out and to challenge his fear, Riley heads out to meet a bunch of stingrays.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's all about the fear factor this time, as Julia deals with a potted threat first, before catching a tiny house dweller, and scaling a rooftop to rescue a big snake.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Julia will get a love-bite from her favorite snake, Bonny the dog continues her snake detection training, and then there's a deadly wrangle with a juvenile eastern brown.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Julia rescues a terrified Russian rapper from a neighborhood "gangster", Johnny finds himself in a tug of war with a python and bonny gets her first shot looking for snakes in the field.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Julia faces off against an unwelcome house guest in the form of an inquisitive serpent. Meanwhile, the new member of the team, Bonny, goes to doggy boot camp.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: An increase in sightings of the Bronze Whaler Shark around the coast of New Zealand appears to mean an increase in shark numbers. This trend is cause for concern for water users.

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The East Australian Grey Nurse is the only shark in the world that is critically endangered. More than 50% of the animals are carrying hooks and traces from fisherman's lines. Interaction with humans is endangering this animal.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It's everyone's worst nightmare  eaten alive by a shark. But how likely is this to happen? Riley is out to debunk the myths about shark attacks. He will be giving us clear instructions on what to do and how to stay safe when confronted by a shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 4

programme.desc: Julia grapples with a massive python, before encountering a lightning fast whip snake and visiting a hospital to talk snake bites.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On their own in the Pacific Ocean are the Chatham Islands: wild, remote, and circled by a population of great white sharks.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 2

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bitter sweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: Lost River
programme.desc: Billy is led into a macabre underworld in her quest to save her childhood home and hold her family together.

programme.title: My Best Friend Is a Vampire
programme.desc: After a weird sexual encounter, a teen turns into a vampire, while being pursued by clumsy vampire hunters.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: When their friend accidentally channels a mysterious signal, a group of co-eds rally to stop a terrifying evil

programme.title: The Possession
programme.desc: A young girl buys an antique box at a yard sale, unaware that inside lives a malicious ancient spirit.

programme.title: Amityville 3
programme.desc: A journalist moves into the infamous house, adamant that the horrific tales are nothing but urban legends.

programme.title: Amityville: The Awakening
programme.desc: A single mother moves her three children into a haunted house, unaware of its bloody history.

programme.title: The Turning
programme.desc: A governess is hired by a man who has become responsible for his nephew and niece after their parents' death.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A counselor working with plane-crash survivors is thrust into a mystery when her clients begin to disappear.

programme.title: Mary
programme.desc: A family looking to start a charter-boat business buys a ship that holds terrifying secrets once out on water.

programme.title: Scream 4
programme.desc: Ghostface returns to Woodsboro – but it’s a new decade, with new rules.

programme.title: Stan Helsing
programme.desc: A man learns he is a Van Helsing and must save his town from the six greatest movie monsters of all time.

programme.title: The Messengers 2
programme.desc: A farmer notices his luck begin to change after he places a mysterious scarecrow in his cornfield.

programme.title: Leprechaun
programme.desc: An evil, sadistic Leprechaun goes on a killing rampage in search of his beloved pot of gold.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Kittens in Mittens: Dora is reading a book of nursery rhymes to Abuela's kitty, Lucky. Lucky loves the one about the three little kittens who ring the bells on their mittens as they dance and sing!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A cute little Zenguin takes a wishing coin and leads the girls on a chase around their new boat. / The girls visit Imma, the Waterfall Genie, at her home for a pool party, not knowing that Zeta is close behind.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's doing magic tricks for us today! For his first trick, he turns Boots into a chicken! But when he's going to turn him back into a monkey, he lets out a big sneeze that sends the wand flying off into Magic Land where it breaks!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dora, Emma and Kate help Gus the Bus take all of the instruments to the kids at Music School.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 218
programme.desc: The King of Numbers - Part 1: Join Milli, Geo, and Bot for their greatest adventure ever, as Team Umizoomi sets off on a journey to visit their friend, the King of Numbers, in his magical kingdom.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When Zeta's sister comes to visit, Zeta is shocked to discover that her once sorcerific sister is now a genie! When Samira sends the girls out on a fun quest, Zeta tricks them into finding a bunch of magical items for her instead.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: It’s the second ever Team Truck Challenge - a big race that pairs trucks together in racing teams. And this time Blaze's teammate is...Crusher?! Will Crusher be able to resist his cheating ways to win for the very first time?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dora gets to start the Big Gymnastics Show! But when Swiper swipes her special rainbow ribbon, Dora and Boots need your help on a gymnastics-filled adventure to get it back so they can begin the show! Fantastic gymnastics!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Sonya can't wait to be in the Umi City Toy Boat Race. But just as the race is about to begin, Sonya's boat begins sailing out of control, and all kinds of things go wrong.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 125
programme.desc: Todos los animales del bosque irán a la gran fiesta en la casita del árbol. Dora y Botas deberán cruzar el Lago Cocodrilo, pasar por encima de la Muralla de Piedra y así podrán ir ellos también a festejar.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering out in the desert, they must embark on a wild west adventure to bring them back to Starla’s barn.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Darington has built the ultimate stunt-track, and every Monster Machine in town is coming to see the show! But when a jealous Crusher tricks Darington and sends him far, far away, it’s up to Blaze and AJ to rescue him.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Fire Engine To The Rescue: Team Umizoomi is visiting the Umi City Fire Station today. When the alarm sounds, the firefighters leave the station. Just then, Vanessa's sister Abby gets stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Counting Comet: A Counting Comet comes crashing to Earth! The only thing that can fly him home again is the Umi City Space Shuttle - and it's launching later today!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When the train to the Big Horse Show breaks down, Dora, Boots, and Pinto the Pony need your help to get there with the ribbons, so Pinto can win his first blue prize ribbon!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Leah invites her genies over to join the fun. Leah makes a wish to make Zac's house look haunted, but the genies turn it into a real haunted house, with a real Frankenstein! It's a spooktacular adventure!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When Zeta takes some of Ula's powerful gems, Shimmer, Shine, Leah, Nila and Ula must work together to stop her. When the girls go looking for the Zahramay Tea Flower, they run into cute little Fuzzle Whuzzles who complicate their quest.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: There's a fire on the bridge and it's too much for the Fire Chief and his team to handle. They need Firefighting Blaze to help. With time running out, Blaze hurries across town. But can he get to the bridge in time?

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Lost Dog: Milli, Geo and Bot are playing with their friend Anna and her dog, Buster! He knows lots of tricks - and when you say 'jump,' he jumps into the air - or in this case, into a truck. Oh no!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: The King of Numbers - Part 2: The team's greatest adventure ever continues, as Milli, Geo and Bot search far and wide for the keys to open Zilch's tower.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: It's breakfast time, and just as Milli, Geo and Bot are about to enjoy their cereal, they realize they're out of milk. Kids from all over town are calling in with the same problem!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When Adara's flowers won't bloom, the girls and their friend Minu travel to a Sky Garden to find a Zummingbird who can help. Shimmer, Shine, and Leah travel to the Dragon Forest as they help Shaun track down an elusive, magical creature.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze visits VelocityVille to compete with his new racecar pals in the longest race ever: the Hundred Mile Race! But Crusher is racing too, and he’ll do anything to win.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: Day at the Museum: Our friend Melissa is waiting to board the rocket ship ride at the children's museum - but then some space volcanoes erupt, requiring the help of Team Umizoomi to put things right.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ visit VelocityVille, a town full of race cars where everybody loves to go fast! But when a snooty car named Speedrick traps all the other racers, Blaze must transform into a super-fast race car to free his new friends.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Leah and Zac have been saving for months to get the big prize at the arcade. When the ticket counting machine malfunctions and ruins all of their tickets, Leah calls on her genies for some arcade assistance!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Blaze and Starla discover a map that leads to a track of legend – the Bouncing Bull Racetrack! The friends set out on a Wild West quest to find the track and take the ride of their lives.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dora travels to Brazil to play in the Big Cup Soccer Tournament, and if her team can beat the Monsters, they'll win the big cup.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 616
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis: Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dora and Boots journey deep into the Never-to-be-Seen-Again Forest so they can bring magic water back from Sparkling Lake and save the magic in Fairytale Land.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dora's on her way to the doctors for her yearly check-up! Dora likes going to see Dr. Valdés because she gets to hear her heartbeat, see how much she's grown in one year, and get a new sticker at the end of the visit!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are playing with their friend Zeg when he accidentally gets blasted by a geyser into a far away mud pit. It’s up to Blaze and AJ to save him, and they must use engineering design inspired by their new dinosaur-truck-friends.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: One night, while taking care of Abuela's 3 kitties, Dora awakens to find that Lucky has chased a ball of string right into a storybook world! Help her find him on a magical moonlight adventure!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The Umi City Toy Store: Milli, Geo and Bot meet up with their friend Colin at the Umi City Toy Shop. Colin is going to buy a quite extraordinary stuffed toy dog - but then a monkey arrives.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Blaze, Starla, and Darington can’t wait to play every animal’s favorite sport: Jungle Ball! But when their teammate Tooks the Toucan gets launched from the stadium, it’s up to the friends to get her back in the game.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dora has a big surprise for Perrito on Surprise Hill, but Swiper's trying to get there first to swipe it! Join Dora, Boots, and Perrito for an animal-filled adventure with help from lots of friends and their playful pets too!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 117
programme.desc: Geo has a new pet - a seahorse! Coincidentally, there's a problem at the Umi City Aquarium, where there's a big crack in the seahorse tank. Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Samira tells the girls the story of how she and Zeta first met – and how they were once best friends. / The girls must stop Zeta when she takes a scepter that gives her the power to grow magical vines and gems.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It’s Christmas Eve, and Blaze and AJ are helping Santa load his magic bag of presents to deliver all over the world. But Crusher accidently knocks over the bag and sends the presents flying.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher discover a medieval kingdom holding a Royal Race! The two trucks become knights to compete in the race across the realm. But even though Sir Blaze is the speediest knight of all, Crusher's cheats won't make it easy to win.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find a lovable little space creature named Winky. He came to visit with his family, our Purple Planet friends. But, uh oh, he's lost. We have to get Baby Winky back to his family before their spaceship takes off!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When a mystery bandit makes off with Blaze's trophy, he'll need to track down the culprit, all while learning about magnets.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Zac uses a wish to bring his dog Rocket to Zahramay Falls – but the genies mistake him for a monster. / After using magic to make Zac forget who he is, Zeta trains him as her apprentice and tries teaching him potions.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Piggy 500, and Starla is excited to race with her prize pig, Zippy, in a team race. But when her competitor Crusher and his rude pig, Slop, cheat and send Zippy far away, it’s up to Blaze, AJ, and Starla to find him.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are on Animal Island when they discover a world of tiny creatures right under their tires: Insect City! The friends transform into a super-strong ant and a bouncy grasshopper for their littlest big adventure yet!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history: the Race to the Top of the World! Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and his Monster Machine friends persevere to make it to the finish line. Part 2

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: When the magical ladybugs escape from Samira's palace, the girls must get them back before Zeta cause trouble with them. When Zeta loses faith in her sorcery abilities, Shimmer, Shine and Leah help her search for something else she'd be good at.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Today is the Umi City Kite Festival and Jeannie can't wait to fly her beautiful dragon kite. Suddenly, a big gust of wind blows the kite's pieces far and wide throughout Umi City.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Gabby, Blaze and AJ are out in the wilderness when they get a call – Blaze’s friends have come down with a sickness called the Sneezles! Our heroes must race back to Axle City to bring the sick trucks the medicine oil they need.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck’s baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It’s up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Leah wishes for help making cupcakes for a bake sale, she and the genies find themselves stuck with a giant birthday cake, some farm animals, and a river of cupcake batter. How will Leah finish without any wishes left?

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Zeg has a ticket to ride a brand new dinosaur roller coaster: the Dinocoaster! But when the ticket blows away, it’s up to Blaze to help his buddy track it down and get back to the amusement park in time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 181
programme.desc: SpongeBob is forced to go back to the milkshake academy // SpongeBob and Patrick must look after Squidward after he hits his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 182
programme.desc: Squidward finds a good book which happens to be SpongeBob's private diary // Mrs. Puff is again teaching SpongeBob to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 183
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds a nasty sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab // Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 184
programme.desc: An imprisoned Plankton tries to break out of jail and steal the secret formula // Spongebob replaces his broken spatula with a magical one from Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 185
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom - except for Plankton, who plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 186
programme.desc: Mr Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank // Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 187
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain // There's ghostly goings-on

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 188
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero // Mr Krabs spins the story of the monstrous Yeti Crab which eats lazy workers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 189
programme.desc: SpongeBob, You're Fired!: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob. Unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work doing anything, anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 190
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but becomes lost // After failing his driver's test again, Mr Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 191
programme.desc: After receiving an invitation, Squidward scrambles to find a friend to take with him // Patrick gets swept up in the world of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 192
programme.desc: Mr Krabs throws an event to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day // Mr Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his Navy days.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 193
programme.desc: SpongeBob cares for the stray snails that start appearing // Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 194
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new board game // After accidentally flushing Mr Krabs' safe, SpongeBob and Squidward enter the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 195
programme.desc: SpongeBob's life changes in unexpected ways // When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 196
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick's behaviour in 'The Fishbowl', and then in 'Married to Money', Mr Krabs takes Plankton's advice and finally marries the only thing he ever loved... money!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 197
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends // SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs and must get them working before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 198
programme.desc: The Sharks are the toughest guys in town, but their next confrontation might be too much // Plankton clones SpongeBob to steal the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 199
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, and move away, to Squidward's glee // Plankton realises he can twist fortune cookies to suit his evil plot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 200
programme.desc: Goodbye, Krabby Patty?: Mr Krabs manufactures Krabby Patties on an industrial scale, but it drives a wedge between SpongeBob and Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Bad reviews lead to trouble in the Krusty Krab // Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 202
programme.desc: When Gary gets lost outside, he has to go on an incredible journey to get back home // Spongebob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, and must keep it up!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 203
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret formula at home, Gary must protect it from Plankton // An accident causes everyone in town to become like Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S9 Ep. 204
programme.desc: A storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away // Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Help Wanted/Reef Blowers/Tea at the Treedome: SpongeBob finally applies for a job at the Krusty Krab./SpongeBob finds the perfect use for his high powered reef blower.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Bubblestand/Ripped Pants: SpongeBob introduces his unique talent of bubble blowing./When SpongeBob tries to impress Sandy Cheeks at Mussel Beach, he ends up ripping his pants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jellyfishing/Plankton: While Squidward recovers from a bicycle accident, SpongeBob and Patrick take him jellyfishing./SpongeBob falls victim to a scheme by the evil Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Naughty Nautical Neighbors/Boating School: Squidward plays a joke on SpongeBob and Patrick, but the joke backfires on Squidward./It's exam time again at Mrs. Puff's Boating School.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Pizza Delivery/Home Sweet Pineapple: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Squidward make the first successful pizza delivery./SpongeBob is losing his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Watching reruns of Mermaid Man & Barnacle Boy./SpongeBob loses his self-confidence when an arrogant customer claims SpongeBob forgot to put pickles on his Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's Boating School picks SpongeBob as this weeks Hall Monitor./Over the repeated warning of his friends, SpongeBob takes a wild jellyfish home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Sandy has taken on the enviable mission of taking a rocket ship into outer space./Mr. Krabs surreptitiously gives SpongeBob a pair of squeaky boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: SpongeBob decides to leave his industrialized life and live off the land with the jellyfish./Fed up with SpongeBob and Patrick, Squidward decides to sell his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Culture Shock/F.U.N.: There's a talent show at the Krusty Krab and Squidward takes over the planning./The evil Plankton tries to steal a Krusty Krabs' Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: In "Your Shoe's Untied", Patrick has a brand new pair of shoes, but he needs SpongeBob's help to tie them. Then in "Squid's Day Off", SpongeBob is in charge of the Krusty Krab!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't understand why no-one wants to go near him in "Something Smells", and then in "Bossy Boots", Mr Krabs' daughter Pearl gets a job at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Patrick is thrilled when he gets an award in the post, but sadly it was meant for SpongeBob in "Big Pink Loser", and then in "Bubble Buddy", SpongeBob makes himself a new friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: SpongeBob must deal with some dangerous pirate pie bombs in "Dying For Pie", then in "Imitation Krabs", Plankton builds a fake Mr Krabs to get the secret Krabby Patty recipe.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Sandy is out of town for a few days so SpongeBob and Patrick are pet sitting for her in "Wormy", and then in "Patty Hype", SpongeBob invents a brand new culinary sensation!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: SpongeBob wonders if he can be grown up and still kiss his Granny in "Grandma's Kisses", and then in "Squidville", Squidward moves away - but surely he's not missing SpongeBob?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Sandy takes on SpongeBob in a non-stop week of extreme sports in "Prehibernation Week", then in "Life of Crime", SpongeBob and Patrick borrow a balloon and end up on the run.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Christmas Special: Join the President of the SpongeBob SquarePants Fan Club, Patchy The Pirate and the gang to find out why there's nothing better than Christmas in Bikini Bottom!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick visit Sandy while she's hibernating in 'Survival of the Idiots', and then in 'Dumped', Gary the snail seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Mrs Puff will do anything to make sure that SpongeBob passes his driving test in 'No Free Rides', and in 'I'm Your Biggest Fanatic', SpongeBob finds out his hero isn't so great.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Now that Josh is no longer dating Mindy he wants to play the field and challenges Drake to a bet to see who can score more dates.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: In an attempt to get to know each other better and increase productivity, Kenzie organizes a team building retreat in Game Shakers.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When Drake is falsely accused of playing a practical joke on one of his teachers and threatened with suspension, he and Josh plead their case before the Honor Council.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie get complaints from their neighbour, so they bake him a pie. After the pie sends the neighbour to hospital, Dub and Trip must clear the girls' names. (S1, ep 13)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Drake and Josh accidentally burn down their neighbor's tree house. Their parents force the boys to rebuild the tree house and Drake and Josh plan to do it quickly.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The boys return from tour and find Jo flirting with a hot new guy, new kids hanging out at the pool, and loads of schoolwork! With the second leg of their tour starting soon, will life in LA return to the way it was?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The guys have been having a little too much fun living in Hollywood and after getting charged again for breaking stuff at the Palm Woods and Gustavo has had enough and makes them get jobs!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys accidentally destroy the tape of the new Big Time Rush episode they were supposed to give the network. Needing a replacement episode the guys decide to make a blooper show which Stephen Glickman and Ciara Bravo host.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The boys are tired of sharing a ride and get money to buy a car, but all goes bananas when Drake buys an orangutan named Bobo instead.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Drake's new girlfriend might be tougher than him. Josh trying to impress Mindy's parents might be even tougher. Will the boys prevail, or will girl power rule the day?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The guys all chase the same girl, causing problems in the band for the first time.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: BTR is making a cameo on a popular kid’s TV show, but Carlos’ pursuit of the show’s teen star puts him and Kendall in the crosshairs of her evil stage mother. Logan & James battle Yo Gabba Gabba over their amazing snack table.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time and Josh is sure that this year, his is the project to beat. But when Mindy Crenshaw makes a surprise return, sparks fly in the most unexpected places.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Big Time Invasion: BTR has to stop the invasion of the British boy band! Concerned that Gustavo is spread too thin, the boys try to hire a top music manager. Unable to agree, the four split and a rift quickly escalates within the band.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Sky Whale - Part 1: Babe and Kenzie's school project, Sky Whale, becomes an accidental viral video game hit, until rap star Double G comes to collect his share of the profits.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Gustavo starts an all-girl pop group, sparking jealousy from the guys.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Coming to terms with how their world has changed, the guys decide to take control and with Gustavo plan their first big concert.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The boys return from their world tour and are now famous at the Palm Woods, but they just want to get settled and focus on girls. Griffin tries to bribe Carlos to pick his favorite song for the boys’ upcoming radio interview.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: The Game Shakers haven't been getting along. Dub recommends they see his office therapist: Snoop Dogg.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: After Trip solicits romantic advice from Babe for an alleged friend named Chuck, she comes to suspect that Trip has a crush on her, and tries her hardest to avoid an awkward work situation.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Griffin is pitching a line of BTR merchandise to the CEO of Selmart, but the boys hate the products. Taking matters into their own hands the guys crash the meeting and accidently get their music banned from Selmart stores.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: After a botched weightlifting routine, Josh injures his toe and is forced to the hospital. Drake wants nothing to do with this until a bodacious young nurse catches his eye.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys are pitched a kids cartoon show but instead do a video game to expand their brand. A mix-up while wearing motion capture suits puts them at the center of an extraterrestrial news story.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: A toy company hires Game Shakers to make a game based on a toy that they're not allowed to see.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Josh and Drake both get a job at the Movie Theater and works toward the coveted assistant manager position.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 115
programme.desc: The Game Shakers work to finish creating a new game. But Dub's hoping to score a duet with a famous singer and pushes her nightmare step-grandson on them.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: When pop star Kayla Batch hires The Game Shakers to make a lifestyle game, she invites Babe to join her elite squad while Kenzie is left on the outs.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The most popular kid in school is throwing what may be the greatest sixteenth party ever, but Drake and Josh may be having cake for two after they get banned from the party.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 216
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie are suspicious of Trip's new fame-hungry girlfriend and are determined to find out if she's using him to get closer to Double G.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers sign up for the restroom-sharing app Air TnP, one of their customers sabotages their new game with a virus, and the kids have to figure out a way to undo the damage.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 120
programme.desc: The Game Shakers visit a mummy exhibit. Hudson accidentally snaps off one of its fingers. Babe leads a quest to glue it back on without getting caught.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys are excited to head back to Minnesota for the holidays, but Gustavo’s got them working on a Christmas EP, and won’t let them go home until it’s done.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Trip becomes depressed after losing a big video game battle to a 7-year-old.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: The boys have the fight of all fights and decide to move out. James ends up squatting in a cool retiree’s apartment, Logan moves into a place right by the water, Carlos builds a cardboard house, and Kendall must fix things.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Jordin Sparks is staying at the Palm Woods while she records a new song with Gustavo. The guys are told to stay away from her because they are bad luck...

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jo’s publicist wants the press to think she’s dating her new co-star, so Kendall and Jo must sneak around and hide their relationship!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s time again for the prank war at the Palm Woods, and this time it's kids versus adults as they battle for the honor of winning Lord Prankington’s Cup.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mrs. Hayfer needs a house sitter and it's the boys to the rescue, but all doesn't go according to plan when they meet Tiberius, a vicious dog with an appetite for..Drake & Josh?!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The guys are not thrilled with their boring apartment at the Palm Woods and hatch a plan to improve it when Gustavo creates a fun 'fake' living area for them on a soundstage for an upcoming EPK shoot.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The boys are scheduled to make their first TV appearance, but when it looks like BTR will be bumped from the line-up, they do whatever it takes to make their debut happen.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lucy releases her revenge album about Kendall and it becomes a huge hit! James, desperate for attention, creates a rumor that he and Cher Lloyd are recording a duet, and Carlos gets bad press after he appears to hit an old lady.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Drake decides that he and Josh are going to be the first to ride the Demonator, the fastest and scariest rollercoaster opening tomorrow at Mystic Mountain.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When a crime show decides to film reenactments at the Premiere, fantasy and reality collide as Josh uproariously finds himself cast as the lead. San Diego's most wanted Movie Bandit!
